name: Beef Salad Ole
recipeIngredient: 1/4 inch thick, cut into short, thin strips
1 medium Red or green bell pepper,
-or 1/2 each, cut into short, thin strips
1 cup Short, thin red onion strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine Pace Picante Sauce, olive oil, vinegar (or balsamic), crushed oregano, and minced garlic. Mix well.
2. Place the sliced beef in a plastic bag. Pour half of the sauce mixture into the bag.
3. Seal the bag securely.
4. Chill for at least 1 hour or up to 12 hours.
5. Just before serving, arrange the meat and vegetables on a serving platter.
6. Pass remaining dressing and serve with additional Pace Picante Sauce.
